recommendations.title: Guardians of the Galaxy
recommendations.overview: Light years from Earth, 26 years after being abducted, Peter Quill finds himself the prime target of a manhunt after discovering an orb wanted by Ronan the Accuser.

recommendations.title: The Guardians of the Galaxy Holiday Special
recommendations.overview: On a mission to make Christmas unforgettable for Quill, the Guardians head to Earth in search of the perfect present.

recommendations.title: Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 3
recommendations.overview: Peter Quill, still reeling from the loss of Gamora, must rally his team around him to defend the universe along with protecting one of their own. A mission that, if not completed successfully, could quite possibly lead to the end of the Guardians as

recommendations.title: Superman
recommendations.overview: Superman, a journalist in Metropolis, embarks on a journey to reconcile his Kryptonian heritage with his human upbringing as Clark Kent.

recommendations.title: The Suicide Squad
recommendations.overview: Supervillains Harley Quinn, Bloodsport, Peacemaker and a collection of nutty cons at Belle Reve prison join the super-secret, super-shady Task Force X as they are dropped off at the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese.

recommendations.title: Slither
recommendations.overview: A small town is taken over by an alien plague, turning residents into zombies and all forms of mutant monsters.

recommendations.title: Super
recommendations.overview: After his wife falls under the influence of a drug dealer, an everyday guy transforms himself into Crimson Bolt, a superhero with the best intentions, though he lacks for heroic skills.

recommendations.title: Groot's Pursuit
recommendations.overview: Groot investigates a spooky noise that’s been haunting the Quadrant, which leads to an intense dance off.

recommendations.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
recommendations.overview: An aging Chinese immigrant is swept up in an insane adventure, where she alone can save what's important to her by connecting with the lives she could have led in other universes.

recommendations.title: Trollhunters: Rise of the Titans
recommendations.overview: The Guardians of Arcadia reunite to battle the nefarious Arcane Order, who've reawakened the primordial Titans.
recommendations.director: Johane Matte, Andrew L. Schmidt, Francisco Ruiz Velasco
